name: alhazen-skills
description: Knowledge graph skills for the Alhazen scientific notebook framework (TypeDB-powered)

plugins.name: alhazen-core
plugins.description: REQUIRED FIRST: Sets up TypeDB and loads the Alhazen base schema. Install this before any other Alhazen skill.

plugins.name: jobhunt
plugins.description: Job hunting notebook — track applications, skill gaps, and learning plans. Self-contained: TypeDB auto-initializes on session start.

plugins.name: they-said-whaaa
plugins.description: Credibility and consistency tracker — ingest YouTube transcripts and news, detect contradictions

plugins.name: scientific-literature
plugins.description: Multi-source scientific literature search and ingestion (EPMC, PubMed, OpenAlex, bioRxiv)

plugins.name: alg-precision-therapeutics
plugins.description: Rare disease mechanism investigation from MONDO diagnoses using Monarch Initiative

plugins.name: literature-trends
plugins.description: Abductive argumentation-based literature trend analysis across tagged literature threads
